title: How can I know if someone has edited their comment?
excerpt: How can I know if someone has edited their comment?

posts.author: MediaVoice (Ali Ahmed Brohi)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I know if someone has edited their comment?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MediaVoice - Whenever a comment is edited, it will show up like this. You can hover to see the date and time of the edit. Unfortunately, you can’t see the before and after of the text, however.
